creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
ouch, get it right this time and update the PLIST ;-).

Index: mutt/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/ports/mail/mutt/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.60
diff -u -r1.60 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/05/26 07:02:03	1.60
+++ Makefile	1999/06/11 00:52:00
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.60 1999/05/26 07:02:03 obrien Exp $
 
-DISTNAME=	mutt-0.95.5i
-PKGNAME=	mutt-0.95.5
+DISTNAME=	mutt-0.95.6i
+PKGNAME=	mutt-0.95.6
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.guug.de/pub/mutt/  \
 		ftp://ftp.uib.no/pub/mutt/  \
@@ -50,9 +50,9 @@
 		--with-sharedir=${PREFIX}/share/mutt \
 		--with-docdir=${PREFIX}/share/doc/mutt
 .if defined(BATCH) || defined(USE_SLANG)
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-slang=${PREFIX}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-slang=${LOCALBASE}
 .elif defined(USE_NCURSES_PORT)
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-curses=${PREFIX}
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-curses=${LOCALBASE}
 .endif
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PKGNAME}
 MAN1=		mutt.1 mutt_dotlock.1
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@
 
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 post-build:
-	touch ${WRKSRC}/doc/mutt.man ${WRKSRC}/doc/manual.txt
+	${TOUCH} ${WRKSRC}/doc/mutt.man ${WRKSRC}/doc/manual.txt
 	${PATCH} ${PATCH_ARGS} < ${FILESDIR}/patch-doc-ref
 	printf ",s|\$${PREFIX}|%s|g\nw\nq\n" ${PREFIX} | \
 		ed -s ${WRKSRC}/doc/mutt.man

Index: mutt/patches/patch-04
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/ports/mail/mutt/patches/patch-04,v
retrieving revision 1.4
diff -u -r1.4 patch-04
--- patch-04	1999/02/13 20:15:12	1.4
+++ patch-04	1999/06/11 00:52:03
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
---- configure.orig.bak	Fri Feb 12 13:59:51 1999
-+++ configure	Sat Feb 13 18:00:01 1999
-@@ -1725,6 +1725,9 @@
+--- configure.orig	Thu Jun  3 13:17:59 1999
++++ configure	Thu Jun 10 16:56:43 1999
+@@ -1727,6 +1727,9 @@
  /* We use char because int might match the return type of a gcc2
      builtin and then its argument prototype would still apply.  */
  char $ac_func();
